name: Citizens Bank Of Rogersville
description_short: Community bank in Rogersville, Missouri, established 1908, offering personal and business banking services with local branch presence and 24/7 ATM access.
description_long:
Citizens Bank of Rogersville is a locally-rooted community bank founded on December 15, 1908, with over 115 years of history serving the Rogersville, Missouri area. The institution was capitalized with $10,000 and established by seven local shareholders. The current main banking center is located at 1001 West Center Street at the corner of US Highway 60 and Business 60, which opened in July 2002. The bank has evolved through multiple relocations and expansions, including a significant modernization in 1983 that added drive-through lanes and conveniences to accommodate changing customer needs.

Citizens Bank of Rogersville provides a comprehensive suite of community banking services designed for both personal and business customers. Their offerings include online and mobile banking available 24/7/365, traditional deposit and withdrawal services through lobby and drive-through channels, debit and ATM card services integrated with the Visa and TransFund networks, wire transfer services, safe deposit boxes, notary services, and a coin-counter machine. The bank emphasizes competitive loan rates and a loan center to assist with personal and business financing needs. Their physical banking hours are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Monday-Friday for lobby services, with extended drive-through hours from 7:30 AM to 6:00 PM weekdays and 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM Saturday.

The bank distinguishes itself through deep community integration and personalized service. Staff are positioned as local professionals available to develop customized financial solutions for individual circumstances rather than applying standardized approaches. The institution maintains accessible customer service via phone (417-753-2836) and email (WebRequest@cbofr.com), with dedicated hotline support for card issues (888-297-3416 after-hours). The bank demonstrates commitment to security awareness through phishing prevention education and fraud protection resources. Their ABA Routing Number is 081507166, and they highlight the availability of both traditional in-person banking and modern digital channels.

Citizens Bank of Rogersville serves as a viable option for customers seeking community-oriented banking with local decision-making and relationship-based service. However, as a regional community bank, their product offerings and technology platforms are likely more limited compared to national or fintech competitors. Customers should confirm that this bank meets specific needs around account types, loan products, and digital features before opening accounts, as community banks typically focus on foundational banking services rather than specialized financial products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online and mobile banking with 24/7/365 access and enrollment
Checking and savings accounts (implied from website, specific products not detailed)
Debit cards integrated with Visa and TransFund ATM networks
ATM services available 24 hours daily at bank locations
Loan origination and servicing through loan center with competitive rate positioning
Wire transfer services available at banking centers
Safe deposit boxes for document and valuables storage
Notary public services with photo ID requirement
Drive-through banking (7:30 AM-6:00 PM weekdays, 8:00 AM-12:00 PM Saturday)
Lost and stolen debit card emergency support (phone-based)
Automatic coin-counter machine ('Wiley the Wildcat') at main bank location
Business banking services (referenced but not detailed on website)
pros: Long-established community bank with 115+ year history (founded 1908) providing local stability and institutional continuity
24/7 ATM access with TransFund surcharge-free network access for cash withdrawals
24/7/365 online and mobile banking enrollment and transaction capabilities for digital-first customers
Extended drive-through hours (7:30 AM-6:00 PM weekdays, 8:00 AM-12:00 PM Saturday) accommodating working professionals
Dedicated after-hours hotline (888-297-3416) for lost/stolen card emergencies and customer service
Safe deposit boxes and notary services available at local branch locations
Personalized loan center and competitive rate positioning with local underwriting and decision-making
Automatic coin-counter machine available to all customers at main bank location
cons: Limited branch presence as small community bank may restrict accessibility outside Rogersville area
Website content does not detail specific loan products, interest rates, account types, or fee structures needed for comparison shopping
No information provided about mobile app capabilities, digital security features, or technology platforms versus competitors
Smaller institution may have fewer specialized products (investment services, wealth management, business banking depth) compared to regional or national banks
Lobby hours restricted to 9:00 AM-5:00 PM weekdays limits access for customers unable to visit during business hours
best_for: Rogersville, Missouri residents seeking community bank relationships with local decision-makers and personalized service
Small business owners in the area wanting to establish banking relationships with local lenders familiar with community dynamics
Customers prioritizing in-person branch relationships and human interaction over digital-only banking platforms
Individuals needing basic banking services (checking, savings, ATM access, debit cards) without specialized investment or wealth products
diagnosis: Citizens Bank of Rogersville is best suited for customers in the Rogersville, Missouri area who value community banking relationships, personalized service, and local decision-making over digital innovation or product breadth. The main caveat is that as a small regional community bank, it likely offers limited specialized products and fewer digital features than national banks or fintech competitors, so customers with complex financial needs should verify product availability before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
